Reproduction: Upload Panel Overlaps Album Action Bar (#27794)

Both scenarios place an album action bar (blue, z-2) and an upload panel at the same screen position. Try clicking the buttons in each panel.

BEFORE — Upload panel has NO z-index
Album Bar (z-2)

Upload Panel (no z-index)

Click the button above…
AFTER — Upload panel has z-10
Album Bar (z-2)

Upload Panel (z-10)

Click the button above…
